scripts.dev: pnpm --dir ../.. electron:ui:prepare-dev && node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && electron src/main.js
scripts.start: pnpm --dir ../.. electron:ui:prepare-dev && node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && electron src/main.js
scripts.build: pnpm --dir ../.. electron:ui:build && node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/stage-gateway.mjs && node scripts/download-node.mjs && electron-builder build
scripts.build:mac: pnpm --dir ../.. electron:ui:build && node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/stage-gateway.mjs && node scripts/download-node.mjs && electron-builder build --mac
scripts.build:win: pnpm --dir ../.. electron:ui:build && node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/stage-gateway.mjs && node scripts/download-node.mjs && electron-builder build --win
scripts.build:linux: pnpm --dir ../.. electron:ui:build && node scripts/generate-icon.mjs && node scripts/stage-gateway.mjs && node scripts/download-node.mjs && electron-builder build --linux
